proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends increasing the supply caps for weETH (from 12,000 to 24,000) and rETH (from 4,500 to 7,500) on the WETH Arbitrum Comet to improve capital efficiency.

disclosed_entities.name: WETH Arbitrum Comet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: - Increase WETH Arbitrum Comet’s weETH Supply Cap

disclosed_entities.name: Configurator
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: updates the parameters by using the respective methods on the Configurator.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Increase WETH Arbitrum Comet’s weETH Supply Cap from 12,000 to 24,000
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increase capital efficiency within the Comets by raising the weETH supply cap.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Increase WETH Arbitrum Comet’s weETH Supply Cap from 12,000 to 24,000

claimed_actions.raw_action: Increase WETH Arbitrum Comet’s rETH Supply Cap from 4,500 to 7,500
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increase capital efficiency within the Comets by raising the rETH supply cap.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Increase WETH Arbitrum Comet’s rETH Supply Cap from 4,500 to 7,500

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal consists entirely of straightforward parameter updates to supply caps on existing markets.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The proposal updates the parameters by using the respective methods on the Configurator.

limitations: No explicit contract addresses were provided for the tokens, comet, or configurator.
The exact function names used to update parameters are not specified.
